author: brandiskip
body:
Replaced [Phase2OTHarvestStub.cc](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/plugins/Phase2OTHarvestStub.cc) with the Python configuration [Phase2OTEffClient_cff.py](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/work_branch/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/python/Phase2OTEffClient_cff.py) to calculate efficiencies using [DQMGenericClient::computeEfficiency](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/DQMServices/Components/plugins/DQMGenericClient.cc#L723).

Updated [TrackerPhase2HistUtil.h](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/work_branch/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/interface/TrackerPhase2HistUtil.h) with new helper functions for booking and filling resolution histograms, which removes hundreds of lines of repetitive C++ code.

Added event weights to [Phase2OTValidateStub.cc](https://github.com/brandiskip/cmssw/blob/work_branch/Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V/plugins/Phase2OTValidateStub.cc#L623-L710).

Added new histograms for the number of stubs, Delta r (for 2S and PS modules), and Delta bend (for 2S and PS modules in the barrel and endcaps).

Organized the stub directory structure by moving 40 detailed residual histograms into a new Residual/Detailed subfolder. Users will see the new stub histograms in the DQM output. The detailed residual plots are now nested under the Residual/Detailed directory to declutter the main DQM workspace.

For more details, see slides found [here](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26196656/BES_Meeting_Update_3_25_26.pdf). Overall, this PR eliminates a few thousand lines of code by using DQMGenericClient and C++ helper functions to reduce redundancy.

Histograms can be reviewed [here](https://cernbox.cern.ch/s/CPkljA2Fbzvfu41) under TrackerPhase2OTL1TrackV and TrackerPhase2OTStubV.

PR validation:
scram build code-checks
scram build code-format
title: Validation/SiTrackerPhase2V: Streamline validation code and add necessary histograms
